productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Light Brown Top
description: Composition Light brown round neck top made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a half buttoned placket and stitch detailingFitComfortWash careonly hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroideryFor the understated yet stylish vibe, wear this basic united colors of benetton top. Styled with the label's classic high fashion sense, This piece is an off-duty essential. Layer this with a blazer with an exaggerated shoulder, and a scarf. Slip into suede lace-up formal boots to complete your ensemble.Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
